name: firstack
tagline: Intelligent Power Solutions for Green Energy and Smart Industry
description: Firstack (Hangzhou Feishide Technology Co., Ltd.) is a leading Chinese power electronics company specializing in intelligent gate drivers, power stack solutions, and semiconductor test equipment. Founded in 2011, Firstack serves wind power, solar, EV, and industrial markets with innovative digital drive technology.
longDescription:
Firstack Technology Co., Ltd. (Hangzhou Feishide Technology) is a national high-tech enterprise founded in 2011, headquartered in Hangzhou, China. As a technology leader in intelligent power solutions, Firstack specializes in IGBT/SiC MOSFET gate drivers, power stack modules, and power semiconductor test equipment.

The company has established itself as a trusted partner in high-reliability applications including wind power generation, photovoltaic systems, new energy vehicles, energy storage, mining equipment, and rail transit. Firstack's innovative digital gate driver technology, represented by the industry-leading 2FSC0435+ digital driver core, provides unprecedented flexibility and intelligence for power semiconductor applications.

With strong R&D capabilities and numerous patents, Firstack is certified as a National High-Tech Enterprise, National Double-Software Enterprise, and Zhejiang Province R&D Center. The company continues to drive innovation in power electronics, enabling the transition to green energy and smart industry.

faqs.question: What are Firstack's main product categories?
faqs.answer: Firstack offers four core product categories: (1) Gate Drivers - Including digital driver cores like 2FSC0435+ and plug-and-play solutions for IGBT and SiC MOSFET; (2) Power Stacks - Integrated power solutions combining modules with optimized drivers for wind, solar, and EV; (3) Test Equipment - Power semiconductor analyzers and characterization tools; (4) ASIC Solutions - Programmable gate driver ASICs optimized for SiC and GaN devices. All products feature advanced digital technology for maximum flexibility and reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find detailed specifications and application guidance for your power electronics needs.

faqs.question: What makes Firstack gate drivers different from competitors?
faqs.answer: Firstack gate drivers feature several unique advantages: (1) Digital Technology - Industry-leading digital driver cores with programmable parameters and advanced diagnostics; (2) 2FSC0435+ Series - High-reliability digital driver core with unprecedented flexibility; (3) SiC Optimization - Specialized drivers for next-generation SiC and GaN devices; (4) Integrated Protection - Comprehensive fault detection and protection features; (5) Custom Capability - Flexible customization for specific application requirements. Firstack's programmable ASIC technology enables more intelligent and adaptable gate drive solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss which Firstack gate driver solution is best suited for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: Does Firstack offer customization services?
faqs.answer: Yes, Firstack specializes in custom power solutions. They can develop custom gate drivers, power stacks, and ASIC solutions based on specific voltage, current, and application requirements. Customization options include: (1) Custom gate driver parameters and protection settings; (2) Specialized power stack configurations; (3) Application-specific ASIC programming; (4) Integration with customer systems. This flexibility makes Firstack an excellent choice for specialized high-reliability applications in wind, solar, and EV markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Submit your requirements to our technical team for a custom solution evaluation and quotation.

faqs.question: What industries does Firstack primarily serve?
faqs.answer: Firstack serves four primary industries with specialized power solutions: (1) Wind Power - Gate drivers and power stacks for onshore/offshore wind converters; (2) Solar & Energy Storage - Solutions for PV inverters and battery energy storage systems; (3) New Energy Vehicles - Automotive-grade drivers for EV motor drives and onboard chargers; (4) Industrial Drives - Rugged solutions for mining equipment, rail transit, and industrial motor control. Each industry benefits from Firstack's high-reliability design and comprehensive technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit our solutions page to explore Firstack applications specific to your industry and project requirements.
